scripts.css:build: cp node_modules/flickity/dist/flickity.css src/assets/css/flickity.css && cp node_modules/plyr/dist/plyr.css src/assets/css/plyr.css && sass src/scss/styles.scss src/assets/css/style.css --style=expanded --load-path=node_modules
scripts.css:watch: cp node_modules/flickity/dist/flickity.css src/assets/css/flickity.css && cp node_modules/plyr/dist/plyr.css src/assets/css/plyr.css && sass src/scss/styles.scss src/assets/css/style.css --watch --style=expanded --load-path=node_modules
scripts.build: npm run css:build && npm run js:build && eleventy
scripts.build:pages: npm run css:build && npm run js:build && ELEVENTY_PATH_PREFIX=/stela/ eleventy
